---
name: Bug
description: Report an issue with the site, API, docs, or operations
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Summary

What is not working as expected?

## Impact

Who or what is affected?

## Current behavior

What happens now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen?

## Evidence

Add relevant URLs, command results, monitoring status, or messages.

## Likely files or systems

- 

## Service state

Classify the target before changing behavior:

- [ ] active
- [ ] degraded
- [ ] deprecated
- [ ] removed
- [ ] replaced
- [ ] unknown

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Cause or likely cause is documented
- [ ] Fix or mitigation is applied
- [ ] Validation result is recorded
- [ ] Operational record is created if needed

## Validation method

How should this be checked?

## Merge policy

- [ ] AI may merge after checks pass
- [ ] Human approval required before merge
